title: corylopsis rotundifolia
intro: Corylopsis rotundifolia, also known as the round-leaved winter-hazel, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting relaxation. Corylopsis rotundifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
